Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.introBody:
Welcome to I ❤️ NDB (Nouadhibou). We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring that your personal information is handled in a safe and responsible manner. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.
By creating an account and using I ❤️ NDB, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy.
Privacy.dataBody: When you create an account and use our platform, we collect the following types of information:
dataList: Account Information: Your name, email address, and password when you register.
Profile Information: Your display name, bio, profile picture, cover photo, city, and any other details you choose to add.
Posts and Comments: Content you publish on the feed, including text, links, and reactions.
Memories: Stories, photos, and historical content you contribute to the memory archive.
Ideas: Suggestions and proposals you submit to improve the city.
Gar3tak Items: Items you list to share with the community.
Media: Images and videos you upload to the platform.
Cookies and Session Data: Technical data collected through cookies and similar technologies.
Privacy.accountsBody: When you create an account on I ❤️ NDB, we collect your name and email address. You may optionally provide additional profile information such as a bio, profile picture, and city. Your profile is visible to other community members. You can control what information is displayed by editing your profile settings at any time.
Privacy.contentBody: Any content you post on the platform — including feed posts, memories, ideas, comments, and Gar3tak listings — is stored on our servers and may be visible to other users according to your privacy settings and the nature of the feature. We retain this content to provide our services and maintain the community archive. You can delete your content at any time, and we will remove it from public view.
Privacy.mediaBody: Images and videos you upload are stored securely on our servers. We use these media files only to display them on the platform as you intend. We do not use your uploaded media for any purpose other than providing our services. You may delete any media you have uploaded at any time through the platform interface.
Privacy.cookiesBody: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to maintain your session, remember your preferences, and improve your experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device. You can control cookie settings through your browser. Essential cookies are required for the platform to function properly. Analytics cookies help us understand how the platform is used so we can improve it.
Privacy.rightsBody:
You have the right to access, update, or delete your personal information at any time. You can:
- Edit your profile information through the platform settings.
- Delete your posts, memories, ideas, and Gar3tak items individually.
- Request full account deletion by contacting the platform administrators.
- Withdraw consent for data processing where applicable.
- Export your data by contacting us.
We will respond to any data request within a reasonable timeframe.
Privacy.contactBody: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or your personal data, please contact the platform administrators through the platform's contact channels or by reaching out to the community management team.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.introBody: Welcome to I ❤️ NDB. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use the platform. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and contributors of the I ❤️ NDB community platform.
Terms.rulesBody: To maintain a welcoming and constructive community, all users must follow these rules:
rulesList: Treat all community members with respect and dignity.
Share content that is accurate, constructive, and relevant to the community.
Use the platform in good faith and for its intended purposes.
Protect your account credentials and notify administrators of any unauthorized use.
Follow all applicable local and international laws when using the platform.
Terms.responsibilitiesBody: As a user of I ❤️ NDB, you are responsible for:
responsibilitiesList: The accuracy of the information you provide in your profile and posts.
Ensuring that any content you upload does not violate the rights of others.
Maintaining the confidentiality of your account password.
Reporting any violations of these terms to the platform administrators.
Complying with any additional guidelines posted for specific features or campaigns.
Terms.prohibitedBody: The following types of content are strictly prohibited on I ❤️ NDB:
prohibitedList: Hate speech, harassment, bullying, or discriminatory content.
Explicit, violent, or sexually explicit material.
Spam, misleading information, or fake news.
Content that infringes on the intellectual property rights of others.
Content promoting illegal activities or substances.
Malicious code, phishing attempts, or content that compromises platform security.
Impersonation of other users, public figures, or organizations.
Terms.moderationBody: I ❤️ NDB reserves the right to review, moderate, and remove any content that violates these terms or is deemed inappropriate for the community. Moderators and administrators may take action without prior notice when necessary to protect the community. We strive to apply moderation consistently and fairly. If you believe content has been removed in error, you may contact the moderation team for review.
Terms.suspensionBody:
Violation of these terms may result in any of the following actions:
- Warning: A formal notice about the violation.
- Content Removal: Removal of specific content that violates the terms.
- Temporary Suspension: Limited access to the platform for a specified period.
- Permanent Ban: Complete removal of access to the platform.
- Account Deletion: Removal of the account and all associated data.
The severity of the action depends on the nature and frequency of the violation. Appeals may be submitted to the platform administrators.
Terms.limitationsBody: I ❤️ NDB is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. We make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding the availability, reliability, or suitability of the platform for any particular purpose. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the platform at any time. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use the platform.
Terms.contactBody: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact the platform administrators through the available communication channels.

DataDeletion.title: Data Deletion
DataDeletion.introBody: At I ❤️ NDB, we respect your right to control your data. This page explains how you can request the deletion of your data from our platform. We are committed to processing deletion requests promptly and transparently.
DataDeletion.noticeBody: Currently, account and data deletion is handled manually by platform administrators. You can request deletion by contacting the platform administrators directly. Self-service account deletion will be available in a future update.
DataDeletion.accountBody:
To delete your entire account and all associated data, please contact the platform administrators with your request. Include the email address associated with your account so we can verify your identity. Once verified, we will:
- Permanently delete your account.
- Remove your profile information.
- Anonymize or delete your posts, comments, and reactions.
- Remove your uploaded media files.
Please note that some content (such as comments on others' posts) may be anonymized rather than fully deleted to preserve community context.
DataDeletion.postsBody: You can delete individual posts directly from the platform interface. Navigate to the post you wish to delete and use the delete option. If you need to delete multiple posts or are unable to delete a post yourself, please contact the platform administrators for assistance.
DataDeletion.memoriesBody: Memories you have contributed can be deleted from the memory archive. Navigate to the memory you wish to delete and use the available options. If you need help deleting memories or wish to remove all your memory contributions, contact the platform administrators.
DataDeletion.ideasBody: Ideas you have submitted can be deleted through the platform interface. Please note that deleting an idea will also remove associated votes and comments. If you encounter any issues, reach out to the platform administrators.
DataDeletion.fadlaBody: Gar3tak items you have listed can be deleted from the Gar3tak section. Once deleted, the item will no longer be visible to other community members. For bulk deletion or assistance, please contact the platform administrators.
DataDeletion.contactBody: To request data deletion or ask any questions about this process, please contact the platform administrators through the platform's communication channels. We will respond to your request within a reasonable timeframe and confirm once the deletion has been completed.
